meanings.definition: the act that results in something coming to be
examples: the fashioning of pots and pans
it was already in the making

meanings.definition: come up with (an idea, plan, explanation, theory, or principle) after a mental effort
examples: excogitate a way to measure the speed of light

meanings.definition: arrange by systematic planning and united effort
examples: devise a plan to take over the director's office

meanings.definition: give by will, especially real property
